description: Samantha Bobot from Digital Currency Group introduces a panel discussing the integration of real-world assets into DeFi, featuring experts from Solana Labs, BridgeSplit, Credix, and Parcel. They explore the definition and challenges of tokenizing off-chain assets like car loans and real estate, emphasizing the need for legal and compliance infrastructure in bridging these assets on-chain.
topic_summary: Panel discussion on real-world assets in DeFi, featuring insights on tokenization, legal infrastructure, and the role of various platforms in facilitating on-chain transactions [t=3:52 - t=300:55].
